name: I Shall Not Be
chorusText:
I shall not be
I shall not bei shall not be moved
I shall not bei shall not be moved
Just like a tree
that’s planted by the water
I shall not be moved
Jesus lives forever, I shall not be moved
Jesus lives forever, I shall not be moved
Glory Hallelujah, I shall not be moved.
Glory Hallelujah, I shall not be moved.
